pick.rationale: SMU enters as the clear analytical favorite despite Miami (OH)'s gaudy 31-1 record, with the Mustangs ranking 42nd in both KenPom and Torvik compared to the RedHawks' 87-93rd range—a gap of roughly 50 spots. Miami's only loss came in their MAC tournament opener to UMass, exposing their vulnerability against tournament-caliber competition, while SMU tested itself nightly in the ACC and even beat Syracuse by 17 in their conference tournament before a narrow 4-point loss to Louisville.
